goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt record audit receipt artifact builder for runtime patch consume execution without runtime execution, durable persistence, patch application, permit consumption, or route/server mutation.
scope_out: Do not execute runtime, write receipts or audits durably, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime audit receipt record audit receipt authority artifacts can be recorded in memory.
Recorded-at ref and evidence ref are required.
Runtime execution, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, and permit consumption remain false.
assumptions: Runtime execution and durable receipt persistence require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing evidence, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, receipt write, durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-213 authorized runtime patch audit receipt record audit receipts without recording, executing, or writing them.
